argv:
set -euo pipefail
skills=(guru-sync-base guru-discover-change-context guru-clarify-requirements guru-review-contract-wording guru-review-change-request guru-create-task-workspace)
targets=(.trellis/guru-team/skills/packages .agents/skills .codex/skills .claude/skills .cursor/skills)
checks=0
for skill in "${skills[@]}"; do
  source_dir="trellis/skills/guru-team/packages/$skill"
  for target_root in "${targets[@]}"; do
    target_dir="$target_root/$skill"
    diff -qr "$source_dir" "$target_dir" >/dev/null
    while IFS= read -r source_file; do
      relative_file="${source_file#$source_dir/}"
      target_file="$target_dir/$relative_file"
      cmp -s "$source_file" "$target_file"
      [[ "$(stat -f '%Lp' "$source_file")" == "$(stat -f '%Lp' "$target_file")" ]]
    done < <(find "$source_dir" -type f -print)
    checks=$((checks+1))
  done
done
[[ "$checks" -eq 30 ]]
printf 'PACKAGE_PARITY=%s/30\n' "$checks"
commands.summary: All 30 canonical-to-installed/platform path, byte and executable-mode comparisons passed.

argv:
set -euo pipefail
git diff --check
[[ -z "$(find . -path './.git' -prune -o -type f \( -name '*.new' -o -name '*.bak' -o -name '*.rej' -o -name '*.orig' \) -print)" ]]
printf 'HYGIENE_OK\n'
commands.summary: git diff check passed and no sidecar or patch-residue files exist.

argv:
set -euo pipefail
changed=$( { git diff --name-only; git ls-files --others --exclude-standard; } | LC_ALL=C sort -u )
matches=$(printf '%s\n' "$changed" | rg '(^|/)(\.github/workflows|Dockerfile[^/]*|docker-compose[^/]*|k8s|kustomize|helm|database/migrations|db/migrations|Makefile)(/|$)' || true)
[[ -z "$matches" ]]
printf 'DEPLOYMENT_PATHS=0\n'
commands.summary: No CI/CD, container, K8s/Kustomize, Helm, DB migration or Makefile path changed.

argv:
set -euo pipefail
cache=$(find . -path './.git' -prune -o \( -type d -name '__pycache__' -o -type f \( -name '*.pyc' -o -name '*.pyo' \) \) -print)
[[ -z "$cache" ]]
printf 'PYTHON_CACHE=0\n'
commands.summary: No Python bytecode or cache residue exists in the repository.

argv:
set -euo pipefail
platform="$1"
expected="$2"
cases=0
runs=0
for file in /private/tmp/guru145-r4-${platform}-*/guru-*-${platform}-run.json; do
  jq -e --arg expected "$expected" '.status==$expected and ([.cases[].status]|all(.==$expected))' "$file" >/dev/null
  cases=$((cases+$(jq '.cases|length' "$file")))
  runs=$((runs+1))
done
[[ "$runs" -eq 6 ]]
[[ "$cases" -eq 24 ]]
printf '%s runs=%s cases=%s status=%s
' "$platform" "$runs" "$cases" "$expected"
commands.summary: Fresh shared adapter evidence contains six passed runs and 24/24 passed cases with 3/3/6/3/5/4 distribution.

argv:
set -euo pipefail
root=/private/tmp/guru145-r4-claude-probe-guru-sync-base/current/synced-route
test -f "$root/adapter-request.json"
test -f "$root/execution/native-protocol.json"
test -f "$root/execution/native-request.json"
test ! -e "$root/adapter-transcript.json"
test ! -e /private/tmp/guru145-r4-claude-probe-guru-sync-base/guru-sync-base-claude-run.json
printf 'CLAUDE_PROBE_PREPARED_NO_TRACE_OR_EVIDENCE\n'

argv:
set -euo pipefail
matches=$(git diff --no-ext-diff --unified=0 | rg 'BEGIN (RSA|OPENSSH|EC|DSA) PRIVATE KEY|AKIA[0-9A-Z]{16}|gh[pousr]_[A-Za-z0-9]{36,}' || true)

printf 'SECRET_MATERIAL_MATCHES=0\n'
